introSection: Suspended Coaster was a steel inverted roller coaster located at Hangzhou Paradise in Xiaoshan, Hangzhou, Zhejiang, China.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: When it opened in 2011, the ride had red track and blue supports. For the 2016 season, the ride was repainted yellow with blue supports.

fullText:
Suspended Coaster was a steel inverted roller coaster located at Hangzhou Paradise in Xiaoshan, Hangzhou, Zhejiang, China.

When it opened in 2011, the ride had red track and blue supports. For the 2016 season, the ride was repainted yellow with blue supports.
